exec.arg: docker rm -f pearl-hello-world || true && docker rmi -f pearl-hello-world || true && docker image prune -f

gcloud compute ssh "__GCP_VM_NAME__" --project "__GCP_PROJECT_ID__" --zone "__GCP_ZONE__" --command "docker rm -f pearl-hello-world || true && docker run -d --name pearl-hello-world -p 9292:9292 pearl-hello-world"

gcloud compute ssh "__GCP_VM_NAME__" --project "__GCP_PROJECT_ID__" --zone "__GCP_ZONE__" --quiet --command "export GITHUB_TOKEN='__GITHUB_TOKEN__' && sudo chown -R \$USER /app/badminton_court && git config --global --add safe.directory /app/badminton_court && cd /app/badminton_court && git pull && node Scripts/generate-env.js development .env.docker && node Scripts/compile.js && echo '__GITHUB_TOKEN__' | sudo docker login ghcr.io -u xmione --password-stdin && sudo docker build -t ghcr.io/xmione/badminton_court-web:latest -f Dockerfile.binary . && sudo docker push ghcr.io/xmione/badminton_court-web:latest && sudo docker build -t ghcr.io/xmione/badminton_court-mail:latest -f Dockerfile.posteio . && sudo docker push ghcr.io/xmione/badminton_court-mail:latest"

gcloud compute ssh "__GCP_VM_NAME__" --project "__GCP_PROJECT_ID__" --zone "__GCP_ZONE__" --quiet --command "export GITHUB_TOKEN='__GITHUB_TOKEN__' && sudo chown -R \$USER /app/badminton_court && git config --global --add safe.directory /app/badminton_court && cd /app/badminton_court && git pull && node Scripts/generate-env.js development .env.staging && echo '__GITHUB_TOKEN__' | sudo docker login ghcr.io -u xmione --password-stdin && sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.vm.yml --env-file .env.staging --profile staging pull && sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.vm.yml --env-file .env.staging --profile staging up -d --build"

gcloud compute ssh "__GCP_VM_NAME__" --project "__GCP_PROJECT_ID__" --zone "__GCP_ZONE__" --quiet --command "export GITHUB_TOKEN='__GITHUB_TOKEN__' && sudo chown -R \$USER /app/badminton_court && git config --global --add safe.directory /app/badminton_court && cd /app/badminton_court && git pull && node Scripts/generate-env.js docker-production .env.production && echo '__GITHUB_TOKEN__' | sudo docker login ghcr.io -u xmione --password-stdin && sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.vm.yml --env-file .env.production --profile production pull && sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.vm.yml --env-file .env.production --profile production up -d --build"
